title: Shelby Officer Suspended for Punching Woman During Arrest
summary: A Shelby police officer was suspended after punching a woman during an arrest. The officer's identity has not been released.
charlotte_impact: Highlights issues of police conduct and accountability within the Shelby police department.

title: Wrongful Death Lawsuit Filed in Fatal Plane Crash
summary: Greg Biffle's ex-wife, Nicole Biffle, files a wrongful death lawsuit alleging negligence in a plane crash that killed 7 at Statesville Regional Airport.
charlotte_impact: Addresses accountability and potential safety oversights in aviation following a tragic accident.

title: Thieves Target Clover Neighborhood in Vehicle Break-in Spree
summary: Multiple vehicles were broken into in the Clover neighborhood, with at least one gun stolen, marking the second such incident recently.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about local crime trends and community safety in Clover.

title: Salisbury Teacher Arrested on Sex Offense Charges Involving Former Student
summary: David Steelman, 51, a Salisbury teacher, turned himself in on multiple sex offense charges involving a former student dating back to 2012.
charlotte_impact: Deals with serious allegations of abuse of power and potential harm to a minor.

title: Couple Wins $1.6M Judgment Against Builder for Construction Issues
summary: A Denver couple won a $1.6 million judgment against Nest Homes for breach of contract and fraudulent misrepresentation related to construction defects.
charlotte_impact: Addresses consumer protection and accountability in the construction industry.

title: Charlotte Douglas Airport Receives $46.9M for Apron Expansion
summary: The FAA awarded Charlotte Douglas Airport $46.9M to expand its apron as part of a nationwide effort to modernize airport infrastructure.
charlotte_impact: Supports airport development and improved aviation infrastructure.

title: Cooler and Drier Weather Forecast for Friday
summary: A significant cooldown is expected for the weekend, bringing cooler and drier conditions to the Charlotte area.
charlotte_impact: Provides weather information relevant to daily planning.

title: Man Dies Months After Hit-and-Run in North Charlotte
summary: Frank Leon Dent died 10 months after a hit-and-run on West Sugar Creek Road. Police are seeking information on the unknown driver.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the consequences of hit-and-run incidents and the ongoing search for justice.

title: Suspect Arrested in Hit-and-Run of 8-Year-Old in South Charlotte
summary: Shaiquailalia Di Ndia Lashi Harris was arrested and charged with felony hit-and-run after an 8-year-old was struck by a car near Quail Hollow Middle School.
charlotte_impact: Deals with the serious consequences of reckless driving and the importance of accountability.

title: Charlotte Transit System Reports Significant Drop in Crime
summary: Charlotte's transit system reports a 69% drop in crime on buses and light rail following the implementation of new security initiatives.
charlotte_impact: Shows the positive impact of security measures on public transportation safety.

title: Mecklenburg County Liquor Purchases Fund Community Projects
summary: An audit reveals that Mecklenburg County liquor purchases are funding community projects, with increased funding for law enforcement and alcohol education.
charlotte_impact: Shows how alcohol sales contribute to community funding.

title: 16-Year-Old Drowns in Lake Wylie
summary: A 16-year-old drowned in Lake Wylie after failing to resurface after jumping into the water on Thursday afternoon.
charlotte_impact: Highlights water safety concerns and the tragic loss of a young life.

title: Woman Killed in Single-Vehicle Crash in Rock Hill
summary: A 50-year-old woman died in a single-vehicle crash on Red River Road in Rock Hill after her vehicle hit a fence and overturned.
charlotte_impact: Reports on a fatal traffic accident and its impact on the community.

title: Charlotte Student-Athlete Breaks School Record Held by Coach
summary: ZaNovia Davis shatters Garinger High's 400m record, previously held by her coach, Tanya Filmore-Scott, for 41 years.
charlotte_impact: Celebrates athletic achievement and mentorship within the school community.

title: Multiple Arrests in North Charlotte Drug and Firearms Case
summary: Federal and local operations lead to multiple arrests in a north Charlotte case involving drug trafficking and firearms charges.
charlotte_impact: Addresses drug-related crime and its impact on the local community.
